ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ensembles" (
  "ensemble_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ensemble */,
  "ensemble_name" TEXT /* Name of the ensemble */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Description of the simulation experience */,
  "parameters_changing" TEXT /* Type of parameters changing in the simulation (e.g., environment, genetics) */,
  "num_generations" INTEGER /* Number of generations in the simulation */,
  "eggs_per_generation" INTEGER /* Number of eggs produced per generation */,
  "eggs_per_female" INTEGER /* Number of eggs produced per female */,
  "proportion_females" REAL /* Proportion of females in the population */,
  "prop_AA" REAL /* Proportion of individuals with genotype AA */,
  "prop_BB" REAL /* Proportion of individuals with genotype BB */,
  "global_survival" REAL /* Global survival rate of the population */,
  "environment_time" INTEGER /* Time parameter for the environment */,
  "environment_time_variation" INTEGER /* Variation in the environment time parameter */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., urban, rural, marine) */,
  "genetic_variation" TEXT /* Type of genetic variation (e.g., single nucleotide polymorphisms, gene insertions) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who set up the ensemble */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the ensemble */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ensemble_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_rates" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival rate record */,
  "ensemble_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ensemble the survival rates belong to */,
  "survival_females_AA" REAL /* Survival rate for females with genotype AA */,
  "survival_females_AB" REAL /* Survival rate for females with genotype AB */,
  "survival_females_BB" REAL /* Survival rate for females with genotype BB */,
  "survival_males_AA" REAL /* Survival rate for males with genotype AA */,
  "survival_males_AB" REAL /* Survival rate for males with genotype AB */,
  "survival_males_BB" REAL /* Survival rate for males with genotype BB */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population at the time of survival rate measurement */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Specific environmental conditions during the survival rate measurement */,
  "genetic_factors" TEXT /* Specific genetic factors that influenced the survival rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_rates_ensemble_id FOREIGN KEY ("ensemble_id") REFERENCES ensembles ("ensemble_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reproduction_rates" (
  "reproduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reproduction rate record */,
  "ensemble_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ensemble the reproduction rates belong to */,
  "reprod_males_AA" REAL /* Reproduction rate for males with genotype AA */,
  "reprod_males_AB" REAL /* Reproduction rate for males with genotype AB */,
  "reprod_males_BB" REAL /* Reproduction rate for males with genotype BB */,
  "males_freq_dep_coef" REAL /* Frequency-dependent coefficient for males */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population at the time of reproduction rate measurement */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Specific environmental conditions during the reproduction rate measurement */,
  "genetic_factors" TEXT /* Specific genetic factors that influenced the reproduction rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reproduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reproduction_rates_ensemble_id FOREIGN KEY ("ensemble_id") REFERENCES ensembles ("ensemble_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maturation_rates" (
  "maturation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maturation rate record */,
  "ensemble_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ensemble the maturation rates belong to */,
  "eggs_females_AA" REAL /* Number of eggs produced by females with genotype AA */,
  "eggs_females_AB" REAL /* Number of eggs produced by females with genotype AB */,
  "eggs_females_BB" REAL /* Number of eggs produced by females with genotype BB */,
  "female_maturation" REAL /* Maturation rate for females */,
  "male_maturation_AA" REAL /* Maturation rate for males with genotype AA */,
  "male_maturation_AB" REAL /* Maturation rate for males with genotype AB */,
  "male_maturation_BB" REAL /* Maturation rate for males with genotype BB */,
  "maturation_cv" REAL /* Coefficient of variation for maturation times */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population at the time of maturation rate measurement */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Specific environmental conditions during the maturation rate measurement */,
  "genetic_factors" TEXT /* Specific genetic factors that influenced the maturation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maturation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maturation_rates_ensemble_id FOREIGN KEY ("ensemble_id") REFERENCES ensembles ("ensemble_id")
)
